query: SELECT b.id, b.name, COUNT(k.id) as kpi_count FROM branches b LEFT JOIN kpi_targets k ON b.id = k.branchId WHERE b.name = 'Ordu' GROUP BY b.id, b.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT b.id, b.name, COUNT(k.id) as kpi_count FROM branches b LEFT JOIN kpi_targets k ON b.id = k.branchId WHERE b.name = 'Ordu' GROUP BY b.id, b.name;
